summary: Iteration 99: Smart ISO 3834 Consumable Traceability feature - Full E2E testing complete. 27/27 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tested and working. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) normativa_target auto-determination was bypassed due to default model value, (2) analyze-invoice endpoint queried wrong field (fattura_id instead of fr_id).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed BUG: ConsumableBatchCreate model had default normativa_target='entrambe' which bypassed auto-determination logic
Fixed BUG: analyze-invoice endpoint queried fattura_id field instead of fr_id (primary key) in fatture_ricevute collection
Consumable detection keywords working correctly: FILO (sg2,sg3,er70,bobina,rotolo,wire), GAS (argon,co2,miscela,bombola), ELETTRODO (elettrod,bacchett,tig rod,7018,6013)
Priority order: elettrodo > filo > gas (bacchette TIG with ER70 are electrodes, not wire)
Normativa target rules: filo>=1.0mm->en_1090, filo<=0.8mm->en_13241, gas->entrambe, elettrodo->en_1090
Auto-assignment to open commesse (status: preventivo,approvvigionamento,lavorazione,in_produzione) based on normativa compatibility
Frontend FascicoloTecnicoSection.js correctly displays assigned and available consumables with color-coded badges
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/consumables.py (lines 387-416: fixed analyze-invoice to query fr_id first, then fattura_id as fallback)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Consumabili Disponibili section in Registro Saldatura dialog verified)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple consumable batches (filo, gas, elettrodo) with test lotto numbers: GAS-UI-TEST-001, FILO-UI-TEST-001, ELET-UI-TEST-001. Auto-assigned to open commesse.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart ISO 3834 Consumable Traceability feature fully implemented and tested. Two bugs fixed in consumables.py. Test user session and commessa available for verification. Frontend Registro Saldatura dialog shows assigned/available consumables correctly.

test_classes: TestConsumableDetectionLogic (3 tests) - filo, gas, elettrodo keyword detection
TestNormativaTargetRules (5 tests) - auto-determination of normativa based on tipo/diameter
TestConsumableCRUD (6 tests) - list, filter, create, update, delete operations
TestCommessaAssignment (4 tests) - get for commessa, manual assign/unassign, 404 handling
TestInvoiceAnalysis (2 tests) - analyze-invoice endpoint, 404 for nonexistent
TestAutoTriggerOnFatturaCreation (1 test) - auto-import on fattura creation
TestEdgeCases (5 tests) - 404s, empty update 400, duplicate assignment idempotency

tests_executed.results: PASS - Consumables UI in Registro Saldatura working correctly
verified: Fascicolo Tecnico EN 1090 section expanded with 6 document cards
Clicked Registro Saldatura 'Compila' button - dialog opened
Found 'Consumabili Disponibili (Fili / Gas / Elettrodi)' section with data-testid='smart-consumables'
ASSEGNATI A QUESTA COMMESSA: 3 items (elettrodo, filo, gas with correct badges)
DISPONIBILI IN OFFICINA: multiple items available to assign
Lotto numbers and diameter info displayed correctly

features_verified: GET /api/consumables/ - List all consumable batches with optional stato/tipo filters
POST /api/consumables/ - Create batch with auto normativa_target determination
GET /api/consumables/for-commessa/{commessa_id} - Returns assigned and available batches
POST /api/consumables/analyze-invoice/{fattura_id} - Analyze invoice for consumables (now supports fr_id)
Auto-trigger on POST /api/fatture-ricevute/ - Creates batches from consumable lines
Frontend RegistroEditForm shows Consumabili Disponibili section with assigned/available batches

bugs_fixed.root_cause: ConsumableBatchCreate model had default normativa_target='entrambe', so `data.normativa_target or _determine_normativa_target()` always used the default
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed model default to Optional[str]=None so auto-determination is triggered when not explicitly provided

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Endpoint queried {fattura_id: ...} but fatture_ricevute uses fr_id as primary key
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to query fr_id first, then fallback to fattura_id field
